title: Global Territorial Buffer Engine
description: Production pipeline generating seamless, non-overlapping offshore territorial zones for ~200 sovereign territories. Replaced O(N²) vector polygon intersection with O(N) Euclidean Distance Transform for conflict resolution. 8-hour zero-crash run on Databricks with shared-memory parallelism.

title: Batch Geospatial API Enrichment Application
description: Desktop GUI app (.exe) for batch-processing insurance portfolios through 4 internal APIs. Refactored from geocoding-only to full pipeline: geocoding, location info, risk zone enrichment, rate computation. Threaded concurrency, cooperative cancellation, zero operator installation.

title: Cross-Lingual Municipality Enrichment: SFD/MFD
description: Waterfall entity resolution pipeline linking Eurostat census dwelling data to GfK boundaries across 9 European countries. Solved cross-lingual name matching (Greek transliteration, bilingual splits, spatial composite keys) achieving 95–100% match rates per country.

title: US Coastal Proximity Analysis & ArcGIS Toolbox
description: Novel 'Magnet Method' deriving a high-resolution coastal boundary directly from postal code geometries — avoiding km-level systematic distance errors from reference coastlines. Packaged as a reusable ArcGIS Pro Python Toolbox for any polygon dataset.

title: India Building Data Validation: OSM Assessment
description: National-scale pipeline assessing OpenStreetMap building level data accuracy for India. Overpass API acquisition, JRC GHS-SMOD urbanisation stratification, and Google Street View ground-truth validation. Determines viability for insurance exposure modelling.

title: Areal Precipitation Refinement for Rainfall-Runoff Modeling
description: Novel directional DEM smoothing and stratified kriging framework, reducing precipitation estimation errors by 45.4%. Quantified impact on a calibrated HBV model for flood forecasting.

title: Flood Risk Reduction — Roßhaupten
description: Micro-level flood risk assessment for the Rosshaupten Municipality. High-resolution geospatial parameters to model hydrological response and design culvert/retention mitigation strategies.

title: Glacier Dynamics Analysis — Nepal
description: Long-term glacier dynamics (1990–2020) in the Marshyangdi river basin. Machine Learning applied to multi-temporal Landsat and Sentinel-2 imagery for ice differentiation.

title: Snowmelt Runoff Modeling — Inn River Basin
description: Satellite-derived radiation data integrated into a physically-based snowmelt runoff model for the Inn River Basin, Bavaria. Enhanced forecast accuracy for water management.

title: Post-Disaster LULC Change Detection — Nepal 2015
description: Quantified Land Use/Land Cover change patterns in Panauti and Banepa Valley following the 2015 Nepal earthquake using Change Detection techniques and ground validation.
